title: M1: Convert roadmap into GitHub issues/milestones
body:
Track roadmap-to-issue conversion for active M1 items.

Acceptance:
- Active M1 tasks are represented as issues
- Milestone assignment is consistent
- Issue status is reflected back to docs/roadmap/tasklist.md

title: M1: Create labels by workstream and support level
body:
Create and maintain label taxonomy for workstream and support-level tracking.

Acceptance:
- workstream:* labels exist
- support:* labels exist
- labels are documented and used by roadmap issues

title: M1: Open first milestone for supported foundation release
body: Create and maintain the first release milestone that aligns with supported foundation scope.

title: M1: Request for feedback from external users
body:
Publish a feedback request issue for first external evaluators.

Acceptance:
- Issue is public and pinned/linked from docs
- Evaluation prompts include support matrix + playground guidance
- Findings are triaged into roadmap workstreams

title: M1: Add known limitations page
body: Create and maintain known limitations for current supported and experimental slices.
